name: Drizzle
description: Evening rain slanting past the streetlight, puddles flashing below — every redraw changes the downpour’s rhythm.

code.style: --rule: ( /* each streak repeats once via its shadow, so the rain reads in sheets */ --drop: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rx: calc(@r(-130, -90) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(20%, 70%); top: @rand(0%, 40%); width: calc(20px / @Y); height: @rand(20%, 42%); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--drop); opacity: @rand(0.45, 0.95); transform: rotate(18deg); box-shadow: @var(--rx) calc(@var(--rx) * -2) @var(--drop); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.18) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(14%, 50%); width: @rand(28%, 52%); top: 88%; height: 7%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color2); opacity: @rand(0.2, 0.45); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
